seoTitle: Integrate Google Drive With ClickUp: Setup Guide
metaDescription: See how to connect Google Drive to ClickUp so you can attach cloud files, create Docs from tasks, and search Drive content right from your workspace.
intro: Connecting Google Drive to ClickUp lets you keep files organized in the cloud while still working from your task boards. Once the integration is active, you can browse Drive folders from any task, attach live file shortcuts, and even create new Docs without leaving ClickUp. Here's how to set that connection up and start using it.

steps.heading: Open the App Center
steps.body: Click your profile avatar in ClickUp and launch the App Center panel, where cloud storage integrations are managed.

steps.heading: Connect Google Drive
steps.body: Scroll to the cloud storage section, find Google Drive, and click Connect to begin the authorization process.

steps.heading: Grant OAuth permissions
steps.body: Pass through Google's OAuth consent screen and select the account you want ClickUp to access.

steps.heading: Confirm the connection and search settings
steps.body: Back in ClickUp, verify the integration shows as active and adjust Connected Search permissions so files are searchable from the main navigation.

steps.heading: Attach files from a task
steps.body: Open any task card, use the Files section to browse your Drive directory, and select the assets you want to attach as live links.

steps.heading: Create new Drive files on the fly
steps.body: Use the task attachment menu to generate a fresh Google Doc or Sheet directly, and check that it appears on the task's activity timeline.

faq.question: Do I need admin rights to connect Google Drive to ClickUp?
faq.answer: You'll need permission to authorize apps on your Google account and access to the App Center settings in your ClickUp workspace.

faq.question: Does attaching a Drive file use up ClickUp storage?
faq.answer: No, attached files stay hosted in Google Drive as linked shortcuts, so they don't count against your ClickUp storage quota.

faq.question: Can I search Google Drive files from inside ClickUp?
faq.answer: Yes, once Connected Search is enabled you can query Drive files directly from ClickUp's main search bar.

faq.question: What happens if I revoke Google's OAuth access later?
faq.answer: Revoking access will break the live links to your Drive files, so you'd need to reconnect the integration to restore them.
